mapper.select: SELECT metadata ->> 'fileName' AS "fileName", metadata ->> 'fileHash' AS "fileHash", COUNT(*) AS chunks FROM vector_store WHERE metadata ->> 'fileHash' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY metadata ->> 'fileName', metadata ->> 'fileHash' ORDER BY metadata ->> 'fileName'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT metadata ->> 'fileHash' FROM vector_store WHERE metadata ->> 'fileHash' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY metadata ->> 'fileName', metadata ->> 'fileHash' ) t

SELECT metadata ->> 'fileName' AS "fileName", metadata ->> 'fileHash' AS "fileHash", COUNT(*) AS chunks FROM vector_store WHERE metadata ->> 'fileHash' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY metadata ->> 'fileName', metadata ->> 'fileHash' ORDER BY metadata ->> 'fileName' LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
